creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looking at
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/commit-log-message.html
the table is a bit confusing in the elements in the left column are vertically
centered.

For longer entries in the right column this makes it not immediate (and
definitely requiring some mental focus) to identify which lines on the
right side belong to which elements on the left side.

In particular this holds for the "Approved by:" entry, others are easier,
though at least look a bit odd.
